productDisplayName: Baggit Women Sprinkle Taj Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 19 cm x 14 cmCrafted from leatherette with a two-fold open styleOne main zippered compartment with seven card holders, one insert pocket, two id card holders and a zippered pocketAn insert pocket at the backSynthetic shoulder strapPrinted branding on the frontCareWipe with clean, dry cloth to remove dirt
